name: SEADRILL Ltd
business: Seadrill is an offshore drilling contractor providing worldwide offshore drilling services to the oil and gas industry. It primarily owns and operates drillships and semi-submersible rigs for shallow to ultra-deepwater operations. Customers include oil super-majors, state-owned national oil companies, and independent oil and gas companies.

exposures.sentence: We are an offshore drilling contractor providing worldwide offshore drilling services to the oil and gas industry.
We are incorporating artificial intelligence technologies into our processes and these technologies may present business, compliance, and reputational risks.

Failure to adequately protect our sensitive information, operational technology systems and critical data, or our service providers failure to protect their systems and data, could have a material adverse effect on us.

catalysts.event: Capital upgrade project completion and contract commencement for a drilling unit
catalysts.sentence: one was undergoing capital upgrade projects for a contract commencing in the second quarter of 2026
